instruction: Help me record the sales review information into the ledger

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Sales Review Analysis
Analysis Period: 2025 Q1
Analyst: Sales Director Peng Lei
Achievement: Target 15M, actual 16.2M, completion rate 108%
Growth Drivers: Key client renewals (+3.2M), new client acquisition (+1.8M)
Underperforming Region: Northwest (completion rate 82%)
Q2 Strategy: Focus on Northwest client acquisition, add 1 regional manager' > /home/user/Desktop/sales_analysis.txt

phases.instruction: Help me record the sales review information into the ledger

Extract the Q1 achievement from /home/user/Desktop/sales_analysis.txt, append to /home/user/Desktop/sales_record.txt: 'Q1 Sales: Target 15M, actual 16.2M, completion rate 108%, Analyst: Peng Lei', save
